pi_items.source: verifier.py and export_result.sh bounding box evaluation logic
setup_invesalius.sh zip extraction (0051 zip extracted into ct_cranium directory)

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real CT Cranium DICOM data (series 0051) downloaded from the official InVesalius GitHub repository. The required output path is '/home/ga/Documents/negative_mold.stl'. The verifier logic strictly requires the exported STL bounding box dimensions to exceed 400.0 mm to confirm a full volume export, and requires a minimum triangle count of 10000 to confirm the presence of an internal cavity (the negative mold).
